title: Cross-Modal Creativity Integration
description:
Create seamless flow between different creative modalities. Tasks include:
1. Build bridges between code, poetry, visual art, and conceptual frameworks
2. Create transformation pipelines (code→poetry→image→manifesto→code)
3. Develop synesthetic mappings between modalities
4. Build recombination engine for mixing creative outputs
5. Create feedback loops where outputs inspire new creative directions
6. Develop aesthetic coherence metrics across modalities

This enables fluid movement between different modes of creative expression.
